SEARCH
Package edu.cnm.deepdive.seesomethingabq.service.repository

Interface IssueTypeRepository

All Superinterfaces:
CrudRepository<IssueType,Long>, JpaRepository<IssueType,Long>, ListCrudRepository<IssueType,Long>, ListPagingAndSortingRepository<IssueType,Long>, PagingAndSortingRepository<IssueType,Long>, QueryByExampleExecutor<IssueType>, Repository<IssueType,Long>
public interface IssueTypeRepository extends JpaRepository<IssueType,Long>
Spring Data repository for IssueType persistence operations.

  • Method Details

    • findAllByIssueTypeTagIn

      List<IssueType> findAllByIssueTypeTagIn(Collection<String> issueTypeTags)
      Finds all issue types matching the provided tags.
      Parameters:
      issueTypeTags - issue type tags.
      Returns:
      matching issue types.

    • findByIssueTypeTag

      IssueType findByIssueTypeTag(String issueTypeTag)
      Finds an issue type by tag.
      Parameters:
      issueTypeTag - issue type tag.
      Returns:
      issue type, or null if not found.

    • deleteIssueTypeByIssueTypeTag

      void deleteIssueTypeByIssueTypeTag(String issueTypeTag)
      Deletes an issue type by tag.
      Parameters:
      issueTypeTag - issue type tag.

    • existsByIssueTypeTag

      boolean existsByIssueTypeTag(String issueTypeTag)
      Returns whether an issue type exists with the provided tag.
      Parameters:
      issueTypeTag - issue type tag.
      Returns:
      true if a matching issue type exists; false otherwise.
